title: RevertRaidChanges-Extra-BadOmen
description: allows you to obtain BadOmen after killing raid captain, just like before version 1.21.
body:
## Description
### Restored the Raid logic to the state before version 1.21. 
- **Restored the Bad Omen acquisition mechanism.**
- **The 30-second cooldown for Raid has not been removed.**

This DataPack is a version that fixes and optimizes the issues of [RaidCaptainEffect](https://modrinth.com/datapack/raid-captain-effect) and [ClassicBadOmen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classicbadomen).

It allows you to obtain BadOmen after killing raid captain, just like before version 1.21. 

For information on removing the 30-second cooldown for Raid and making Raid Farms usable, refer to [RevertRaidChanges-Normal](https://modrinth.com/datapack/revertraidchanges-normal) and [RevertRaidChanges-Pro](https://modrinth.com/datapack/revertraidchanges-pro).
